name: Blue-eyes White Dragon
description:
An extremely rare
card with
unsurpassed attack
and defense power.

name: Mystical Elf
description:
A delicate elf that
lacks in offense
but has a terrific
defense backed by
mystical power.

name: Hitotsu-me Giant
description:
A one-eyed behemoth
with thick, powerful
arms made for
delivering punishing
blows.

name: Baby Dragon
description:
Much more than just
a child, this dragon
is gifted with
untapped power.

name: Ryu-kishin
description:
A very elusive
creature that looks
like a harmless
statue until it
attacks.

name: Feral Imp
description:
A playful little imp
that lurks in the
dark, waiting to
attack an unwary
enemy.

name: Winged Dragon #1
description:
A dragon commonly
found guarding
mountain fortresses.
Its signature attack
is a sweeping dive
from out of the blue.

name: Mushroom Man
description:
Found in moist areas,
this monster
launches poison
spores against its
enemies.

name: Shadow Specter
description:
Ghostly beast that
appears in the
wasteland and is
particularly
troublesome when
faced in large
numbers.

name: Blackland Fire Dragon
description:
A dragon that dwells
in the depths of
darkness.
Its defensive
capability suffers
from its poor
eyesight.

name: Sword Arm of Dragon
description:
With a body covered
in sword-like thorns,
nothing dares stand
in the way of this
monster when it
charges.

name: Swamp Battleguard
description:
This creature is
armed with a spiked
club that can
destroy almost
anything in its path.
Rumored to have a
brother that is just
as destructive.

name: Tyhone
description:
Capable of firing
cannonballs from its
mouth for long-range
attacks against
enemies.

name: Battle Steer
description:
A bull monster often
found in the woods.
Charges enemy
monsters with a pair
of razor-sharp horns.

name: Flame Swordsman
description:
A fighter gifted with
the power of fire.
Attacks enemies with
a sword that
launches flames.

name: Time Wizard
description:
A sorcerer capable
of bending time to
his will. Though not
powerful at first
glance, appearances
can be deceiving.

name: Right Leg of the Forbidden One
description:
A forbidden limb
sealed by magic.
Whoever breaks
this seal will know
infinite power.
Only one card of
this type may be
included in a deck.

name: Left Leg of the Forbidden One
description:
A forbidden limb
sealed by magic.
Whoever breaks
this seal will know
infinite power.
Only one card of
this type may be
included in a deck.

name: Right Arm of the Forbidden One
description:
A forbidden limb
sealed by magic.
Whoever breaks
this seal will know
infinite power.
Only one card of
this type may be
included in a deck.

name: Left Arm of the Forbidden One
description:
A forbidden limb
sealed by magic.
Whoever breaks
this seal will know
infinite power.
Only one card of
this type may be
included in a deck.

name: Exodia the Forbidden
description:
Once combined with
arms and legs,
this monster is freed
from its magical
chains.
Only one card of
this type may be
included in a deck.

name: Summoned Skull
description:
An entity with dark
powers for confusing
the enemy. Among the
FIEND class of
monsters, this is a
pretty rare card.

name: The Wicked Worm Beast
description:
A monster worm
created by the
powers of darkness.
It suddenly appears
from under the
ground to attack its
enemies.

name: Skull Servant
description:
A skeletal ghost
that isn't strong
but can mean trouble
in large numbers.

name: Horn Imp
description:
A small imp that
dwells in the dark.
Its single horn
makes it a formidable
opponent.

name: Battle Ox
description:
A monster with
tremendous power.
Destroys enemies
with a swing of its
axe.

name: Beaver Warrior
description:
What this creature
lacks in size,
it makes up for in
defense when battling
in the meadow.

name: Rock Ogre Grotto #1
description:
Protected by a solid
body of rock,
this creature throws
a bone-shattering
punch.

name: Mountain Warrior
description: A solid warrior that\ncan move swiftly\nover rough terrain.

name: Zombie Warrior
description:
A deceptively
fragile-looking
skeleton warrior
that is known for its
swift and precise
attacks.

name: Koumori Dragon
description:
A vicious,
fire-breathing
dragon whose wicked
flames corrupt the
souls of its victims.

name: Two-headed King Rex
description: An unusual and\nrarely seen\ntwo-headed dragon.

name: Judge Man
description:
For this
club-wielding
warrior,
there is no other
outcome to battle
than victory or
defeat.

name: Saggi the Dark Clown
description:
This clown appears
out of nowhere and
executes some very
strange moves to
avoid enemy attacks.

name: Dark Magician
description: The ultimate wizard\nin terms of attack\nand defense.

name: The Snake Hair
description:
A monster with the
head of a poisonous
snake. One look will
turn an unwary
opponent to stone.

name: Gaia the Dragon Champion
description:
A warrior's prowess
combines with a
dragon's speed to
create a powerful
offensive force.

name: Gaia the Fierce Knight
description:
A knight mounted on
a horse that travels
faster than the wind.
His battle charge is
a force to be
reckoned with.

name: Curse of Dragon
description:
A wicked dragon that
taps dark forces to
execute a powerful
attack.

name: Dragon Piper
description:
A jar carved with
strange patterns. It
has a particularly
high defense factor.

name: Celtic Guardian
description:
An elf, who learned
to wield a sword,
baffles enemies with
lightning-swift
attacks.

name: Illusionist Faceless Mage
description:
Manipulates enemy
attacks with the
power of illusion.
A very rare card.

name: Karbonala Warrior
description:
A very
average-looking
fighter with an
unusually high
attack factor.

name: Rogue Doll
description:
A unique doll gifted
with mystical power.
Particularly
powerful when
attacking against
dark forces.

name: Oscillo Hero #2
description: Attacks its enemies\nwith thunder.

name: Griffore
description: This creature's tough\nhide deflects just\nabout any attack.

name: Torike
description:
Not as tough as it
looks in terms of
defense.
This monster's sharp
horn gives it an
edge when attacking.

name: Sangan
description:
A compact,
three-eyed monster
that is dangerous
when faced in the
dark.

name: Big Insect
description:
A giant ant that
dwells in the jungle.
Powerful in terms of
both ATK and DEF
factors.

name: Basic Insect
description:
Usually found
travelling in swarms,
this creature's
ideal environment is
the forest.

name: Armored Lizard
description: A lizard with a very\ntough hide and a\nvery vicious bite.

name: Hercules Beetle
description: A massive beetle with\na tough hide and a\ndangerous horn.

name: Killer Needle
description:
A huge bee with
exceptional
strength.
Particularly
dangerous when a
swarm is
encountered.

name: Gokibore
description:
A large, spherical
roach that attacks
its enemies by
rolling over them.
Its tough defense
makes it a formidable
foe.

name: Giant Flea
description:
A giant
blood-sucking flea
that's devastating
when attacking.

name: Larvae Moth
description:
Not much in its
larval form,
this creature is a
force to be reckoned
with when it grows
to become a colossal
moth.

name: Great Moth
description:
A powerful creature
of the forest,
this huge moth
attacks its enemies
by spreading poison
dust with its wings.

name: Kuriboh
description:
By itself, this small
creature may not
seem like much.
But in the dark, it
attacks in numbers
as a formidable
force.

name: Mammoth Graveyard
description:
A mammoth that
protects the
gravesite of its
pack.
It's absolutely
merciless when
facing graverobbers.

name: Great White
description: A giant white shark\nwith razor-sharp\nteeth.

name: Wolf
description:
A rarely seen wolf
with a powerful nose
for catching the
scent of an enemy.

name: Harpie Lady
description:
A human-shaped
animal with wings.
Beautiful to watch,
but lethal when
engaged in battle.

name: Harpie Lady Sisters
description: Three fierce sisters\nwho relentlessly\nattack as a team.

name: Tiger Axe
description: A fast and powerful\naxe-wielding beast\nwarrior.

name: Silver Fang
description:
A snow wolf that's
beautiful to the eye
but absolutely
vicious in battle.

name: Kojikocy
description: A man-hunter with\npowerful arms that\ncan crush boulders.

name: Perfectly Ultimate Great Moth
description:
The final incarnation
of the ultimate
insect,
the Great Moth{15}

name: Garoozis
description: An axe-swinging\nbeast warrior with\nthe head of a dragon.

name: Thousand Dragon
description:
A dragon that has
grown and developed
over a thousand
years.

name: Fiend Kraken
description:
A massive squid that
suddenly appears
from the depths of
the sea to attack
unwary enemies.

name: Jellyfish
description:
An almost invisible,
semi-transparent
jellyfish that drifts
in the sea.

name: Cocoon of Evolution
description:
This creature is
capable of instantly
evolving larvae into
adults.

name: Kairyu-shin
description:
A sea dragon that's
referred to as the
{70}King of the Ocean{70}.
It attacks its
enemies with huge
tidal waves.

name: Giant Soldier of Stone
description:
A giant warrior made
of stone.
A punch from this
creature has
earth-shaking
results.

name: Man-eating Plant
description:
A meat-eating plant
that is attractive
to the eye but
dangerous when
approached.

name: Krokodilus
description:
A vicious crocodile
with intelligence.
Hard scales form
a natural armor for
this creature.

name: Grappler
description:
A devious snake with
a thick body that
wraps around an
enemy monster and
squeezes the life
out of it.

name: Axe Raider
description:
An axe-wielding
monster of
tremendous strength
and agility.

name: Megazowler
description:
Nothing stands in
the way of this
spike-covered
dinosaur.

name: Uraby
description:
Fast on its feet,
this dinosaur rips
enemies to shreds
with its sharp claws.

name: Crawling Dragon #2
description:
A powerful dragon
with teeth that can
grind almost
anything to dust.

name: Red-eyes B. Dragon
description: A very rare card\nwith a high-level\nATK factor.

name: Castle of Dark Illusions
description:
A creature that can
generate darkness to
envelop all that
exists around it.

name: Reaper of the Cards
description:
This monster boasts
a strong defense and
a massive scythe
that cuts through
almost anything.

name: King of Yamimakai
description: Wields the power of\ndarkness to destroy\nits enemies.

name: Barox
description:
This creature flies
through the dark,
attacking its
enemies with its
long, hairy arms.

name: Dark Chimera
description: A fire-breathing\nmonster that dwells\nin the netherworld.

name: Metal Guardian
description:
A fiend guarding
the treasures of the
netherworld.
Its defense is
particularly high in
a dark environment.

name: Catapult Turtle
description:
Well-protected by
its shell,
this monster flings
projectiles from
its catapult.

name: Gyakutenno Megami
description:
Uses her mystical
power to protect
the weak and provide
spiritual support.

name: Mystic Horseman
description:
Half man and half
horse, this monster
is known for its
extreme speed.

name: Rabid Horseman
description:
A powerful
and unstoppable
combination of
bull and horse.

name: Zanki
description:
Prefers to face
enemies one-on-one.
His swiftly drawn
blade delivers a
quick and immediate
finish.

name: Crawling Dragon
description:
A weakened dragon
that can no longer
fly, but is still a
formidable force to
be reckoned with.

name: Crass Clown
description:
A performer
in the Dark Circus,
this clown drains
the strength of
its enemies with
strange dances.

name: Armored Zombie
description:
A warrior raised from
the beyond.
Blindly swings a
sharp blade with
devastating force.

name: Dragon Zombie
description: A dragon revived by\nsorcery. Its breath\nis highly corrosive.

name: Clown Zombie
description:
A clown revived by
the powers of
darkness.
Its strange dance
has sent many
monsters to their
ends.

name: Pumpking the King of Ghosts
description:
This pumpkin king
strikes at its
enemies with its
long tentacles.

name: Battle Warrior
description: A warrior that fights\nwith his bare hands.

name: Wings of Wicked Flame
description:
Soaring over its
enemies on wings of
crimson fire,
this monster attacks
by blasting flames
from its body.

name: Mask of Darkness
description: A shadow mask\ncreated by the hands\nof a dark mage.

name: Job-change Mirror
description: An indestructible,\nwicked mirror that\nblocks enemy attacks.

name: Curtain of the Dark Ones
description:
A curtain woven by
the hands of a
sorcerer. It is said
to enhance the power
of magic-users.

name: Tomozaurus
description:
A deceivingly small
creature that is so
vicious it attacks
both friend and foe
without discretion.

name: Spirit of the Winds
description:
A spirit of the wind
that freely sails
the skies. Known to
generate storms when
it's in a bad mood.

name: Kageningen
description:
Uses both its
physical and shadow
forms to attack,
making it a difficult
creature to
overcome.

name: Graveyard and the Hand of Invitation
description:
A final resting
place that enhances
the power of the
doomed and drains
that of the living.

name: Goddess with the Third Eye
description: A goddess with an\nall-seeing eye that\nreveals all.

name: Hero of the East
description: A samurai from the\nFar East armed with\na razor-sharp sword.

name: Doma The Angel of Silence
description:
This angel rules over
the doomed and
administers it when
necessary.

name: That Which Feeds on Life
description:
A vile monster that
fuels its power by
draining the essence
of life from its
opponents.

name: Dark Gray
description:
Entirely gray,
this beast has
rarely been seen by
mortal eyes.

name: White Magical Hat
description:
A gentleman thief
that eludes the law
despite the fact that
he sticks out like a
sore thumb with his
silk hat and white
cape.

name: Kamion Wizard
description:
A magic-user that
controls chaos
and wields a mighty
sickle.

name: Nightmare Scorpion
description:
A very toxic
creature that
induces nightmares
and attacks its
victims with four
poison-tipped
stingers.

name: Spirit of the Books
description:
A spirit of the books
with infinite
knowledge and an
endless variety of
attack strategies.

name: Supporter in the Shadows
description:
A cute elf that
assists against
enemies while
remaining hidden
from sight.

name: Trial of Nightmares
description: Passes judgment on\nenemies that are\nlocked in coffins.

name: Dream Clown
description:
The mysterious dance
of this creature
draws its enemies
into eternal slumber.

name: Sleeping Lion
description:
Frequently
found sleeping,
this monster is very
dangerous when
awakened.

name: Yamatano Dragon Scroll
description:
This dragon is
conjured from
a picture scroll
to attack enemies.
It has a pretty
low defense factor.

name: Dark Plant
description:
A vicious flower
raised from polluted
soil and fertilized
by dark forces.

name: Ancient Tool
description:
An engine
of destruction
discovered in the
ruins of an ancient
civilization.

name: Faith Bird
description:
A bird with a very
long tail that
attacks with a light
that emanates from
its entire being.

name: Orion the Battle King
description:
A mysterious
creature known as
the king of warriors,
but nobody has lived
long enough to tell
how it earned its
reputation.

name: Ansatsu
description: A silent and swift\nwarrior specializing\nin sneak attack.

name: LaMoon
description:
A sorcerer who lives
on the moon and
attacks opponents
with the power
of lunar light.

name: Nemuriko
description:
A child-like creature
that controls a
sleep spirit to
beckon enemies into
eternal slumber.

name: Weather Control
description:
This monster is
capable of
manipulating the
weather. This power
is the reason behind
the changing climate
of mountains.

name: Octoberser
description:
A strange creature
with the head of a
fish and the
tentacles of an
octopus that attacks
its enemies with
spears.

name: The 13th Grave
description:
A zombie that
suddenly appeared
from plot
#13 - supposedly
an empty grave.

name: Charubin the Fire Knight
description:
A warrior protected
by a shell that can
even deflect the heat
of burning flames.

name: Mystical Capture Chain
description:
A mystical chain that
is believed capable
of binding its
enemies and
preventing their
attacks.

name: Fiend's Hand
description:
Long arms reach out
from the Swamp
of Chaos to drag
in enemy creatures.

name: Witty Phantom
description:
Dressed in a
night-black tuxedo,
this creature
presides over the
doomed.

name: Mystery Hand
description:
Twisting the fabric
of reality, arms
stretch out from
another dimension
to attack opponents.

name: Dragon Statue
description:
A granite warrior
with a dragon's soul
wields a powerful
sword against
all enemies.

name: Blue-eyed Silver Zombie
description:
A creature rumored
to turn enemies
into zombies with
a strange ray that
emanates from its
eyes.

name: Toad Master
description:
Thousands of years
old, this frog wizard
attacks enemies with
an army of tadpoles.

name: Spiked Snail
description:
Evolving from the
powers of darkness,
this snail has arms
and legs that allow
swift attacks
against its enemies.

name: Flame Manipulator
description:
Attacks enemies with
fire-related spells,
such as the
{70}Sea of Flames{70}
and the
{70}Wall of Fire{70}.

name: Necrolancer the Timelord
description:
The first in a line
of golems that
appears almost
anywhere from within
a dimensional ring.

name: Djinn the Watcher of the Wind
description:
Controls the air
currents to create
violent winds and
tornadoes to blow
away its enemies.

name: The Bewitching Phantom Thief
description: A flashy, black-caped\nthief who wields a\nmagic cane.

name: Temple of Skulls
description:
A weird temple
of skulls and bones
that sucks the living
essence of all those
who dare approach it.

name: Monster Egg
description:
A warrior hidden
within an egg that
attacks enemies by
flinging eggshells.

name: The Shadow Who Controls the Dark
description:
A living shadow that
dwells in the realm
of darkness.
It paralyzes its
enemies to prevent
attacks.

name: Lord of the Lamp
description:
A giant that appears
from a mystic lamp
and follows the
orders of the lamp's
owner.

name: Akihiron
description: A mysterious\ncreature that dwells\nbelow the sea.

name: Rhaimundos of the Red Sword
description:
A warrior armed with
the Sword of Crimson
Flames.
Uses fire to bind the
movement of its
enemies.

name: The Melting Red Shadow
description:
A creature that
melts into the earth,
melds with an
opponent's shadow,
and attacks from
below.

name: Dokuroizo the Grim Reaper
description: A living spirit that\npreys on the living\nessence of enemies.

name: Fire Reaper
description:
A creature that
deals out punishment
with its flaming
arrows.

name: Larvas
description:
A fast-moving,
bird-like creature
that strangles an
opposing monster
with its long,
thin arms.

name: Hard Armor
description:
A living suit of
armor that attacks
enemies with a
bone-jarring tackle.

name: Firegrass
description: A fire-breathing\nplant found growing\nnear volcanoes.

name: Man Eater
description: Man-eating plant with\npoison feelers for\nattacking enemies.

name: Dig Beak
description:
Coiling its
serpent-like body,
this creature spins
and attacks with
its snapping beak.

name: M-warrior #1
description:
Specializing in
combination attacks,
this warrior uses
magnetism to block
an enemy's escape.

name: M-warrior #2
description:
Specializing in
combination attacks,
this warrior is
equipped with a
tough, magnetically
coated armor.

name: Tainted Wisdom
description:
A parasite brain
that preys
on the knowledge
and intelligence
of its opponents.

name: Lisark
description:
An unusual creature
with sapphire eyes
that creates visions
to confuse the enemy.

name: Lord of Zemia
description:
A vile entity that
deceives enemies
into walking a path
of destruction.

name: The Judgement Hand
description:
The hand of final
judgment is capable
of intense attacks
against the enemy.

name: Mysterious Puppeteer
description: A puppet master that\nmanipulates enemies\nduring battle.

name: Ancient Jar
description:
A fragile jar from
the past containing
a mysterious
creature.

name: Darkfire Dragon
description: Scorching flames that\nwipe out enemies in\nthe blink of an eye.

name: Dark King of the Abyss
description:
King of the
netherworld.
It's said that he
once had the power
to rule over
the Dark.

name: Spirit of the Harp
description:
A spirit that
soothes the soul
with the music of
its glorious harp.

name: Big Eye
description:
This creature is
covered with
hypnotic eyes for
mesmerizing its
enemies.

name: Armaill
description:
A strange warrior
who manipulates
three fearsome
blades with both
hands and its tail.

name: Dark Prisoner
description:
This creature
manipulates light to
eliminate all traces
of its appearance.

name: Hurricail
description:
A twister that runs
rampant in the
wastelands,
cutting its enemies
with blades of wind.

name: Ancient Brain
description:
Exiled from reality,
this creature is
adept at fighting
in the dark.

name: Fire Eye
description:
A winged eye
enveloped in flames
that attacks enemies
with fire.

name: Monsturtle
description: A vicious turtle\nwith a spiked shell.

name: Claw Reacher
description:
Stretching arms and
razor-sharp claws
make this monster a
formidable opponent.

name: Phantom Dewan
description: A wizard that freezes\nan enemy's movement\nwith a single curse.

name: Arlownay
description:
A maiden in the
flower blossoms
spreads poisonous
pollen against
opponents.

name: Dark Shade
description:
Emits a dazzling
light from its
crystal to blind its
enemies.

name: Masked Clown
description:
A dancing warrior
that makes mincemeat
out of opponents
with a sharp scythe.

name: Lucky Trinket
description: A thin and reedy\ncreature protected\nby sacred power.

name: Genin
description:
Uses amazing
sleight-of-hand
to fool and destroy
its enemies.

name: Eyearmor
description:
This warrior confuses
and destroys enemies
by adopting their
images.

name: Fiend Refrection #2
description:
A bird-beast
that summons
reinforcements
with a hand mirror.

name: Gate Deeg
description:
A creature with
an abdominal portal
used for summoning
monsters from the
netherworld.

name: Synchar
description:
An ugly creature
with two heads and
a mouth for blasting
laser beams.

name: Fusionist
description: A monstrous cat with\nwings and a long,\nstriking tail.

name: Akakieisu
description:
A wizard
whose incantations
numb the senses of
opposing monsters.

name: LaLa Li-oon
description:
Protected by
thunder,
this dangerous cloud
attacks its enemies
with acid rain.

name: Key Mace
description:
A small angel whose
cuteness melts the
hearts of its
enemies.

name: Turtle Tiger
description:
A tiger encased in a
protective shell that
attacks its enemies
with its razor-sharp
fangs.

name: Terra the Terrible
description:
Know as a dweller
of the swamps,
this creature is a
minion of the Dark
forces.

name: Doron
description:
An unpredictable
creature that splits
into two and attacks
an enemy from
opposite directions.

name: Arma Knight
description:
An ammonite warrior
that has protected
the seas from the
dawn of time.

name: Mech Mole Zombie
description:
A creature of the
night that attacks
enemies with its
rocket-powered arms.

name: Happy Lover
description:
A little angel
that fires beams of
happiness from the
heart jewel on its
forehead.

name: Penguin Knight
description:
A penguin-like
creature that slides
on its belly to
deliver a blow with
its outstretched
sword.

name: Petit Dragon
description: A very small dragon\nknown for its vicious\nattacks.

name: Frenzied Panda
description:
A savage beast that
carries a big bamboo
stick for beating
down its enemies.

name: Air Marmot of Nefariousness
description:
A horned beaver with
wings that throws
high-velocity acorns
from the sky with
uncanny accuracy.

name: Phantom Ghost
description:
Malicious spirits
that walk the world
of the living,
unable to find their
final resting place.

name: Mabarrel
description:
A cannon-like
monster that rapidly
fires eyeballs at the
enemy.

name: Dorover
description:
An ugly,
melting creature
that breathes out
poison gas.

name: Twin Long Rods #1
description:
This creature swings
its whip-like arms
for mid-range
attacks against
enemies.

name: Droll Bird
description:
With a battle cry
that curdles the
blood of its
opponent,
this creature
attacks with its
massive beak.

name: Petit Angel
description: A quick-moving and\ntiny angel that's\nvery difficult to hit.

name: Winged Cleaver
description:
This creature
attacks by swinging
around its
sickle-like arms.

name: Hinotama Soul
description:
An intensely hot
flame creature that
rams anything that
stands in its way.

name: Kaminarikozou
description:
This creature stores
lightning within its
body to deliver
electrifying attacks.

name: Meotoko
description:
A huge monster with
a single eye that
fires an intence
beam.

name: Aqua Madoor
description:
A wizard of the
waters that conjures
a liquid wall to
crush any enemies
that oppose him.

name: Kagemusha of the Blue Flame
description:
Serves as a double
for the ruler of the
Blue Flame. A master
swordsman that
wields a fine blade.

name: Flame Ghost
description: A fiery spirit\nthat burns anything\nin its path.

name: Dryad
description:
A spirit of the
forest protected by
the surrounding
plant life.

name: B. Skull Dragon
description:
A very rare creature
created from the
fusion of an uncommon
beast and a vicious
dragon.

name: Two-mouth Darkruler
description:
A dinosaur with two
crushing jaws.
Stores electricity in
its horn and releases
high voltage bolts
from the mouth on its
back.

name: Solitude
description:
A beast-warrior that
swings a massive
scythe that draws on
the spirit of its
enemies to deliver
devastating blows.

name: Masked Sorcerer
description:
A mysterious wizard
whose face remains
forever hidden behind
a strange mask.

name: Kumootoko
description:
A massive,
intelligent spider
that traps its
enemies with webbing.

name: Midnight Fiend
description: A winged creature\nrumored to appear\nat midnight.

name: Roaring Ocean Snake
description:
A massive sea
serpent that creates
tidal waves to wipe
out its enemies.

name: Trap Master
description:
A warrior that
excels in laying
traps such as a
bottomless pit,
for eternally
ensnaring opponents.

name: Fiend Sword
description:
Few have escaped
the curse of this
creature. Those that
have done so have
gained untold power.

name: Skull Stalker
description:
Swift and vicious,
this monster grabs
its victim with its
pincers and attacks
the captive with its
poison stinger.

name: Hitodenchak
description:
A vicious starfish
that spits acid to
melt away its
enemies.

name: Wood Remains
description: A zombie that rose\nfrom the remains of\nthe woodland ruler.

name: Hourglass of Life
description:
A creature
that allows power
to be gained at
the cost of life.

name: Rare Fish
description: An unusual and\nferocious fish with\nthe head of a beast.

name: Wood Clown
description:
An unpleasantly
smiling creature
that wields a scythe
to avoid enemy blows.

name: Madjinn Gunn
description: A living weapon that\nfires projectiles\nfrom its mouth.

name: Dark Titan of Terror
description:
A spirit said to
dwell in the world of
dreams.
Attacks enemies in
their sleep.

name: Beautiful Headhuntress
description: A lovely swordmaster\nwith some very agile\nmoves.

name: Wodan the Resident of the Forest
description:
A warrior that has
long resided in the
forest and enjoys
the protection
of Mother Nature.

name: Guardian of the Labyrinth
description: A warrior that\nguards the entrance\nto the netherworld.

name: Haniwa
description:
An earthen doll that
protects the
treasure in the
tombs of ancient
kings.

name: Yashinoki
description:
A palm tree with a
will of its own that
attacks enemies by
flinging coconuts.

name: Vishwar Randi
description: A woman warrior that\nserves the forces of\ndarkness.

name: The Drdek
description:
An eyeball creature
with legs for jumping
high and delivering
finishing blows with
its sharp claws.

name: Dark Assailant
description:
Armed with Psycho
Sword, this sinister
cutthroat rules the
outer land.

name: Candle of Fate
description:
An opponent's fate
is decided when the
flames of each finger
are extinguished.

name: Water Element
description:
A water spirit that
envelops its
opponent in a thick
fog to cover its
attack.

name: Dissolverock
description:
A monster borne from
the lava pits.
Generates intensive
heat that can melt
away its enemies.

name: Meda Bat
description:
An eyeball fiend
created by a servant
of darkness.
Uses {70}Dark Spheres{70}
to blow away its
enemies.

name: One Who Hunts Souls
description:
A creature with a
sword that gains its
power from the life
forces of its victims.

name: Root Water
description:
An amphibian capable
of calling up a
massive tidal wave
from the dark seas
to wipe out enemy
monsters.

name: Master & Expert
description:
A fearsome duo
consisting of a beast
master and its loyal
servant.

name: Water Omotics
description:
Transforms the water
overflowing from a
jar into attacking
dragons.

name: Hyo
description: An ice warrior whose\nslightest touch\nfreezes an opponent.

name: Enchanting Mermaid
description: A beautiful mermaid\nthat lures voyagers\nto a watery grave.

name: Nekogal #1
description:
A cat creature that
looks cute to the
eye but delivers
scratching blows
with its sharp claws.

name: Angelwitch
description:
A creature that
chose the path of
sorcery to become
a witch.

name: Embryonic Beast
description:
A repulsive monster
with a gaping belly
that swallows almost
anything.

name: Prevent Rat
description:
This monster is
shielded by a hide
covered in thick
hair.

name: Dimensional Warrior
description:
A monster capable of
creating dimensional
rifts to trap its
enemies.

name: Stone Armadiller
description:
With a body armored
by rock-hard fur,
this monster
features excellent
defense capabilities.

name: Beastking of the Swamps
description:
This creature
changes the ground
at its feet into
quicksand to ensnare
its enemies.

name: Ancient Sorcerer
description:
A master fighter
that uses various
staffs to render
enemies unconscious.

name: Lunar Queen Elzaim
description:
A lovely moon goddess
that can throw up
a lunar curtain to
block enemy attacks.

name: Wicked Mirror
description:
A malevolent mirror
that hypnotizes
a beholder and
renders the victim
susceptible
to attacks.

name: The Little Swordsman of Aile
description: An elf warrior\nmounted on a huge\nlizard.

name: Rock Ogre Grotto #2
description:
A stone golem that
turns opponents into
rocks and crushes
them to dust.

name: Wing Egg Elf
description:
Hiding within its
eggshell,
this creature blocks
enemy attacks with
its massive wings.

name: The Furious Sea King
description:
Grand King of the
Seven Seas.
Able to summon
massive tidal waves
to drown the enemy.

name: Princess of Tsurugi
description:
A queen of swords
that is virtually
unequalled in her
mastery of every
blade imaginable
to man.

name: Unknown Warrior of Fiend
description:
The speed of this
warrior creates
an intense vacuum
that can actually
slice through
a monster's hide.

name: Sectarian of Secrets
description:
A sorcerer that
worships the dark
forces and can
summon a massive
hand to drag away
opponents into the
netherworld.

name: Versago the Destroyer
description:
A lord of destruction
born from the heart
of darkness,
this creature can
summon storms to
destroy opponents.

name: Wetha
description:
A rain spirit that
can summon typhoons
to blow away its
enemies.

name: Megirus Light
description:
This creature's
ominous eyes can
unleash piercing rays
against its enemies.

name: Mavelus
description:
Related to the
phoenix,
this creature dwells
in the mountains.
Its fiery breath is
extremely scorching.

name: Ancient Tree of Enlightenment
description:
Armed with a wealth
of knowledge,
this monster is able
to block just about
any attack.

name: Green Phantom King
description:
This youthful king
of the forests lives
in a green world,
abundant with trees
and wildlife.

name: Ground Attacker Bugroth
description:
A land-based armored
robot that is said
to once have marine
attack capabilities.

name: Ray & Temperature
description:
The Sun and the
North Wind join
hands to deliver
a devastating
combination of heat
and gale-force winds.

name: Gorgon Egg
description:
A gorgon's egg with
eyes said to create
whatever creature
crosses its view.

name: Petit Moth
description:
Nobody has any idea
what creature may
spawn from this
mysterious larva.

name: King Fog
description: A spectre that\ndwells in a blinding\ncurtain of smoke.

name: Protector of the Throne
description: A creature that\nprotects the king's\nthrone from usurpers.

name: Mystic Clown
description: Nothing can stop the\nmad attack of this\npowerful creature.

name: Mystical Sheep #2
description:
A monstrous sheep
with a long tail for
hypnotizing enemies
to render them
powerless.

name: Holograh
description:
A monster machine
that generates
images to confuse its
enemies, making them
prone to attacks.

name: Tao the Chanter
description:
A magic-user that
corrodes the yin
and yang to create
a twisted power
to attack enemies.

name: Serpent Marauder
description:
A snake with a single
eye that blows an icy
breath to freeze its
opponents.

name: Gatekeeper
description:
An indestructible
machine built to
protect key
entrances.

name: Ogre of the Black Shadow
description:
An ogre possessed
by the powers of the
dark.
Few can withstand
its rapid charge.

name: Dark Artist
description:
A demented artist
that creates objets
d'art to crush
enemies.

name: Change Slime
description:
A shape-shifting
slime that is capable
of adopting the form
of other creatures.

name: Moon Envoy
description:
A servant of the
moon goddess,
this warrior wields a
pike with
a spectacular
crescent-shaped
blade.

name: Fireyarou
description:
A malevolent
creature wrapped in
flames that attacks
enemies with intense
fire.

name: Psychic Kappa
description: An amphibian with\nextrasensory powers\nfor blocking attacks.

name: Masaki the Legendary Swordsman
description:
Legendary
swordmaster and a
veteran of over 100
battles.

name: Dragoness the Wicked Knight
description:
A warrior equipped
with equipment
fashioned from dragon
scales.

name: Bio Plant
description: A monstrous creature\nborn from a failed\nlab experiment.

name: One-eyed Shield Dragon
description:
This dragon wears a
shield not only for
its own protection
but also for ramming
its enemies.

name: Cyber Soldier of Darkworld
description:
An unstoppable
mechanical soldier
powered by dark
forces.

name: Wicked Dragon with the Ersatz Head
description:
A two-headed dragon
with a pair of
vicious jaws for
crushing its enemies.

name: Sonic Maid
description:
A maiden that uses
sound to her
advantage.
She wields a scythe
that's shaped like a
musical note.

name: Kurama
description:
A vicious bird that
attacks from the
skies with its
whip-like tail.

name: Legendary Sword
description:
A sword that brings
out the best in
warriors. It cannot
be used by servants
of the dark.

name: Sword of Dark Destruction
description: Dark forces\nincrease the power\nof Warriors{15}

name: Dark Energy
description:
Dark forces increase
the power of Fiends
and other monsters
of the Dark{15}

name: Axe of Despair
description:
Fiends and
Beast-Warriors can
constantly use their
maximum strength{15}

name: Laser Cannon Armor
description: Arms Insects with\na powerful laser{15}

name: Insect Armor with Laser Cannon
description: Allows Insects to\nfire an intense\nblast of fire{15}

name: Elf's Light
description: Increases the power\nof elves with\nmystical light{15}

name: Beast Fangs
description: Increases the power\nof Beasts and other\nfanged monsters{15}

name: Steel Shell
description:
Boosts the power of
shelled monsters{15}
Said to have no
effect on those
without shells.

name: Vile Germs
description: Vile microbes boost\nthe power of Plants\nin the woods{15}

name: Black Pendant
description: This pendant grants\nextra power\nto Dark sorcerers{15}

name: Silver Bow and Arrow
description: Silver bow and arrow\nenhances the power\nof Fairies.

name: Horn of Light
description:
Increases the power
of horned creatures{15}
Has no effect
on Dark monsters.

name: Horn of the Unicorn
description: Increases the power\nof Dark monsters\nwith horns{15}

name: Dragon Treasure
description: A legendary treasure\nthat increases the\npower of dragons.

name: Electro-whip
description:
A whip for paralyzing
enemies.
Increases power when
equipped with female
creatures.

name: Cyber Shield
description:
Increases the power
of female monsters
by changing their
attitudes.

name: Elegant Egotist
description:
Creates two
doppelgangers of
Harpy Lady for
three-pronged
attacks{15}

name: Mystical Moon
description: Moonlight increases\nthe power of Beasts{15}

name: Stop Defense
description:
Forces an opponent's
monster card
positioned for
defense into the
attack position.

name: Malevolent Nuzzler
description:
Diabolic forces act
to increase the
power of female and
Dark monsters{15}

name: Violet Crystal
description: Mystic forces from\nthe crystal increase\nthe power of Zombies.

name: Book of Secret Arts
description:
A magic book for
increasing the power
of magic-users.
It cannot be used
by bad-hearted
sorcerers.

name: Invigoration
description: Increases the power\nof Thunder, Rock,\nand Pyro monsters.

name: Machine Conversion Factory
description:
A manufacturing
facility that tunes
up all Machine
monsters.

name: Raise Body Heat
description:
Absorbs the sun's
energy to increase
the power of
Dinosaurs{15}

name: Follow Wind
description:
The winds provide
support to increase
the power of Winged
Beasts and other
flying monsters{15}

name: Power of Kaishin
description:
Poseidon's Strength
is shared to boost
the power of Aqua,
Fish, and Sea Serpent
monsters{15}

name: Dragon Capture Jar
description:
Destroys all
opponent Dragon
monsters on the
playfield{15}

name: Forest
description:
Changes the field
in favor of
Beast-Warrior,
Insect, Plant, and
Beast monsters{15}

name: Wasteland
description:
Changes the field
in favor of Zombie,
Dinosaur and Rock
monsters{15}

name: Mountain
description:
Changes the field
in favor of Dragon,
Winged Beast, and
Thunder monsters{15}

name: Sogen
description:
Changes the field
to meadow land
in favor of Warrior
and Beast-Warrior
monsters{15}

name: Umi
description:
Changes the field
in favor of Aqua and
Thunder monsters,
but unfavorable to
Machine and Pyro
monsters{15}

name: Yami
description:
Changes the field
in favor of
Magic-User and
Fiend monsters,
but unfavorable
to Fairy monsters{15}

name: Dark Hole
description: Sucks up every card\nin play on the field{15}

name: Raigeki
description:
Destroys every
opposing monster
with a stroke
of lightning{15}

name: Mooyan Curry
description: A delicious\nbeef curry increases\nLife Points by 200{15}

name: Red Medicine
description: A magic potion\nthat increases\nLife Points by {5c}00{15}

name: Goblin's Secret Remedy
description: A goblin's herb\nthat increases\nLife Points by 1000{15}

name: Soul of the Pure
description: A fairy potion\nthat increases\nLife Points by 2000{15}

name: Dian Keto the Cure Master
description: A mystical power\nthat increases\nLife Points by {5c}000{15}

name: Sparks
description:
A shower of sparks
inflicts {5c}0 points
of damage
to your opponent's
Life Points{15}{15}

name: Hinotama
description:
A fireball inflicts
100 points of damage
to your opponent's
Life Points{15}{15}

name: Final Flame
description:
Flames inflict
200 points of damage
to your opponent's
Life Points{15}{15}

name: Ookazi
description:
Flames inflict
{5c}00 points of damage
to your opponent's
Life Points{15}

name: Tremendous Fire
description:
An inferno inflicts
1000 points of
damage to your
opponent's
Life Points{15}

name: Swords of Revealing Light
description:
Enemy monsters
are revealed and
your opponent
cannot attack
for three turns.

name: Spellbinding Circle
description: A curse reduces the\npower of all enemy\nmonsters{15}

name: Dark-piercing Light
description: A dazzling light\nreveals all monsters\non the playing field.

name: Yaranzo
description:
A monster that
attacks anybody
who attempts
to open its lid.

name: Kanan the Swordmistress
description:
A lady swordsman
that floats like a
butterfly and stings
like a bee.

name: Takriminos
description: A finned creature\ndistantly related\nto sea Dragons.

name: Stuffed Animal
description: A deceptively cute\nstuffed animal that\nbites.

name: Megasonic Eye
description:
A cryptic doomsday
machine that comes
from the edge of
the universe.

name: Super War-lion
description: A very vicious lion\nwith sharp and long\nclaws.

name: Yamadron
description: A three-headed,\nfire-breathing\nmonster.

name: Seiyaryu
description:
A sacred dragon
that burns away
wickedness with its
mystical flames.

name: Three-legged Zombies
description: Bony and Tubby,\na friendly pair\nof skeletons.

name: Zera The Mant
description:
A huge,
brutal monster that
attacks with
razor-sharp claws.

name: Flying Penguin
description: A rare penguin that\nflies with the wings\non its head.

name: Millennium Shield
description:
A Millennium Item
candidate that is
said to block any
powerful attack.

name: Fairy's Gift
description: Flies around\nspreading happiness\nto all.

name: Black Luster Soldier
description:
A powerful warrior
with the same
capabilities as the
legendary Blue-eyes
White Dragon.

name: Fiend's Mirror
description:
An arcane glass
that draws
its enemies into
the mirror world.

name: Labyrinth Wall
description:
Walls appear
on the field to form
a labyrinth with
no exit.

name: Jirai Gumo
description: A monster spider\nthat dwells under\nthe earth.

name: Shadow Ghoul
description: A dangerous zombie\nthat crawls\nin the dark.

name: Wall Shadow
description:
An unusually fast
monster that sweeps
across walls to
attack its enemies.

name: Labyrinth Tank
description:
A tank that races
around a labyrinth
hunting down
its enemies.

name: Sanga of the Thunder
description:
A golem that uses
lightning attacks
similar to the
Labyrinth Brothers.

name: Kazejin
description:
A golem that
controls the winds
like the Labyrinth
Brothers.

name: Suijin
description:
A golem that uses
water attacks like
the Labyrinth
Brothers.

name: Gate Guardian
description:
Sanga, Kazejin, and
Suijin join to
form a single,
powerful monster.

name: Dungeon Worm
description:
Hidden under the
floors of a labyrinth,
it swallows any who
pass above.

name: Monster Tamer
description:
A master of monsters
that exercises
control over several
creatures.

name: Ryu-kishin Powered
description:
Ryu-kishin enhanced
by the powers of
darkness. Very sharp
talons make it
a worthy opponent.

name: Swordstalker
description:
A monster formed by
the vengeful souls
of those who passed
away in battle.

name: La Jinn the Mystical Genie
description:
A genie of the lamp
that's at the beck
and call of its
master.

name: Blue-eyes Ultimate Dragon
description:
The ultimate dragon
formed by the fusion
of three Blue-eyes
White Dragons.

name: Toon Alligator
description: An alligator monster\nstraight from the\ncartoons.

name: Rude Kaiser
description:
With an axe in each
hand, this monster
delivers heavy
damage.

name: Parrot Dragon
description:
A dragon from the
cartoons that's more
dangerous than it
appears to be.

name: Dark Rabbit
description:
A cartoon rabbit
that quickly leaps
all over the place,
making it a difficult
target.

name: Bickuribox
description: A jack-in-the-box\nthat excels\nin surprise attacks.

name: Harpie's Pet Dragon
description: A favorite pet for\nharpies, but a very\ndangerous dragon.

name: Mystic Lamp
description: A lamp used by\nwizards to mix\npotions.

name: Pendulum Machine
description: A horrible torture\nmachine with a large\npendulum blade.

name: Giltia the D. Knight
description:
Armed with a
soul-searing spear,
this creature favors
magic attacks.

name: Launcher Spider
description:
A spider machine
that launches
explosive rockets
against its enemies.

name: Zoa
description:
A monster whose full
potential can be
achieved when
transformed into its
metal form.

name: Metalzoa
description: A metallic Zoa\ncapable of intensive\nattacks.

name: Zone Eater
description: A sea creature that\nswallows enemies and\nslowly digests them.

name: Steel Scorpion
description:
An iron-tailed
monster equipped
with very sharp
scissors.

name: Dancing Elf
description:
An elf that dances
across the sky with
wings of razor-sharp
blades.

name: Ocubeam
description:
Frightening in
appearance,
this creature uses
its large eyes and
ears to keep track
of any movement.

name: Leghul
description:
Not a very powerful
monster despite its
large fangs and
spikes.

name: Ooguchi
description: A monstrous bullfrog\nwith poison spikes.

name: Swordsman from a Foreign Land
description: An eastern warrior\narmed with a cursed\nsword.

name: Emperor of the Land and Sea
description: A fire-breathing\nreptilian monster.

name: Ushi Oni
description:
A bull monster
resurrected by the
dark arts that
appears from inside
a jar.

name: Monster Eye
description:
A servant that
maintains a close
watch on anything
and everything.
It throws up
a smokescreen
when discovered.

name: Leogun
description:
Huge monster
with a lion's mane
similar to the
{70}King of Beasts{70}.

name: Tatsunootoshigo
description:
A fast-moving sea
monster that has the
bodies of a horse
and a fish.

name: Saber Slasher
description: A rampaging machine\nthat wields\na massive sword.

name: Yaiba Robo
description:
A machine with
several blades
hidden within its
square body.

name: Machine King
description:
Armored with super
alloy, this robot
attacks with blasts
of fire launched from
both arms.

name: Giant Mech-soldier
description:
This monster swings
an earth-shaking axe
that can eliminate
enemies with a single
blow.

name: Metal Dragon
description:
A golden,
fire-breathing dragon
that burns any
opponent in its path.

name: Mechanical Spider
description:
A spider-shaped,
mechanized monster
with sickles at
the end of its legs.

name: Bat
description:
A mechanized bat
that attacks by
dropping explosion
orbs.

name: Giga-tech Wolf
description:
A wolf made entirely
of iron. Its steel
jaws can bite
through anything.

name: Cyber Soldier
description:
Round-shaped
soldiers that roll
around and act as
guardians to the
Machine King.

name: Shovel Crusher
description:
Armed with a pair of
shovels,
this creature is a
walking engine
of destruction.

name: Mechanicalchacer
description:
A hunter that
relentlessly pursues
its target by order
of the Machine King.

name: Blocker
description:
Each separate part
of this creature is
an individual weapon
capable of
devastating attacks.

name: Blast Juggler
description: A walking time device\nthat loves to blow\nenemies away.

name: Golgoil
description: A massive iron golem\nthat appears from\na dimensional rift.

name: Giganto
description:
This creature swings
around a huge spiked
ball to destroy its
enemies.

name: Cyber-Stein
description:
Created in a
basement lab,
this infernal machine
launches rockets
from within its
mouth.

name: Cyber Commander
description:
A strike force
equipped with radar
detectors and
sensors.

name: Jinzo #7
description:
Created in an
underground lab,
this artificial being
occasionally goes
berserk.

name: Dice Armadillo
description:
An armadillo-like
creature that forms
a die whenever it
rolls up its body.

name: Sky Dragon
description: A bird-like dragon\nwith four bladed\nwings.

name: Thunder Dragon
description:
A dragon that
summons thunder and
lightning to attack
its opponents.

name: Stone D.
description:
With a body
consisting entirely
of rocks, this dragon
flings boulders at
its enemies.

name: Kaiser Dragon
description: A very proud and\npowerful dragon\nemperor.

name: Magician of Faith
description:
Despite its weak
strength,
this creature is
capable of casting
spells to eliminate
darkness.

name: Goddess of Whim
description:
A shy goddess that
seems to spend the
majority of her time
sleeping.

name: Water Magician
description:
This creature
surrounds opponents
with water and
envelops them in a
sweeping attack.

name: Ice Water
description:
A very aggressive
mermaid with spikes
for attacking
enemies.

name: Waterdragon Fairy
description:
A fairy that wanders
the seas.
Rumored to have the
capabilities for
summoning sea
dragons.

name: Ancient Elf
description:
This elf is rumored
to have lived for
thousands of years.
He leads an army of
spirits against his
enemies.

name: Beautiful Beast Trainer
description: A rare female\nmagic-user armed\nwith a vicious whip.

name: Water Girl
description: A beautiful creature\nthat flings icy\narrows.

name: White Dolphin
description:
A white,
horned dolphin that
attacks by calling up
tidal waves.

name: Deepsea Shark
description: A violent shark that\nattacks anything\nin the sea.

name: Metal Fish
description: A steel fish armed\nwith a sharp dorsal\nfin.

name: Bottom Dweller
description: A beautiful swimmer\nwith a very nasty\ntemperament.

name: 7 Colored Fish
description: A rare rainbow fish\nthat is almost\nimpossible to catch.

name: Mech Bass
description: This creature\ncarries a plasma\ncannon on its back.

name: Aqua Dragon
description:
A dragon that dwells
in the sea. It is
capable of spitting
high-pressure blasts
of water.

name: Sea King Dragon
description:
The king of the seas,
this creature is
protected by a solid
shell and spits
poisonous bubbles at
its enemies.

name: Turu-Purun
description: A strange, one-eyed\nmonster armed with\na dangerous spear.

name: Guardian of the Sea
description:
A merman warrior
that attacks anyone
who dares to pollute
the sea.

name: Aqua Snake
description:
A creature that
drowns its opponents
by mesmerizing them
with the ball on the
end of its tail.

name: Giant Red Seasnake
description: A sea serpent that\nbites anything that\npasses nearby.

name: Spike Seadra
description:
Using the spikes
sprouting from its
body, this creature
stabs its opponents
and floods them with
electricity.

name: 30,000-Year White Turtle
description:
A massive and
well-protected
giant turtle that
has lived over 30000
years.

name: Kappa Avenger
description: An amphibian sworn\nto avenge the death\nof its brothers.

name: Kanikabuto
description:
A crab monster with
two massive scissors
for cutting up
enemies.

name: Zarigun
description:
A newly evolved
crayfish with sharp
scissors for clipping
the enemy.

name: Millennium Golem
description:
A golem that has
protected treasure
for nearly
a millennium.

name: Destroyer Golem
description:
A golem with a
massive right hand
for crushing its
victims.

name: Barrel Rock
description:
A monster that
charges into enemies
firing a pair of
cannons mounted on
its shoulders.

name: Minomushi Warrior
description:
A rock warrior that
wields a very heavy
sword carved from
stone.

name: Stone Ghost
description:
A creature that
erupts with anger,
resulting in a
crushing rain of
boulders.

name: Kaminari Attack
description:
A monster that
judges wrong-doers
and punishes them
appropriately.

name: Tripwire Beast
description:
This creature
attacks enemies
with electromagnetic
waves.

name: Bolt Escargot
description:
This creature spits
a gooey substance
that robs enemies of
mobility and then
stuns them with
electric shocks.

name: Bolt Penguin
description: A monster with a pair\nof electric whips\ninstead of arms.

name: The Immortal of Thunder
description: A creature that\nattacks enemies\nwith thunderbolts.

name: Electric Snake
description: A serpent with\na tail for\nstoring electricity.

name: Wing Eagle
description: A hunter of the\nskies that has never\nmissed a target.

name: Punished Eagle
description:
A judge of the skies
that delivers
a sentence with
its punishing
silver-white claws.

name: Skull Red Bird
description:
This monster swoops
down and attacks
with a rain of knives
stored in its wings.

name: Crimson Sunbird
description:
A monster burning
with crimson flames
and capable of
delivering a rain of
sparks by flapping
its wings.

name: Queen Bird
description: A creature that\nattacks its enemies\nwith its large beak.

name: Armed Ninja
description:
A blue ninja that
attacks with a large
sickle and spiked
feet.

name: Magical Ghost
description:
This creature casts
a spell of terror and
confusion just before
attacking its
enemies.

name: Soul Hunter
description:
This clown feeds the
life force of its
enemies to
a monstrous lizard.

name: Air Eater
description:
A monster that
suffocates its enemy
by feeding on the
surrounding air
supply.

name: Vermillion Sparrow
description:
A fiery warrior
creature that
unleashes intense
heat from its body.

name: Sea Kamen
description: A cruel monster that\nslices up enemies\nwith its sharp claws.

name: Sinister Serpent
description:
A flying poison snake
that is not very
good at maneuvering
on the ground.

name: Ganigumo
description:
A spider armed with
scissors to attack
anything that
it traps in its web.

name: Alinsection
description:
A stag beetle
monster with
saw-toothed horn
and arms.

name: Insect Soldiers of the Sky
description: Insect soldiers that\nattack in swarms.

name: Cockroach Knight
description:
A cockroach warrior
that hides in small
spaces and emerges
to attack enemies.

name: Kuwagata a
description: A violent stag beetle\nwith a razor-like\ncutter.

name: Burglar
description: A clever mouse with a\nsharpened left claw.

name: Pragtical
description: A very dangerous\nmonster with spikes\non its head and tail.

name: Garvas
description:
A malevolent
creature that
resembles a winged
lion.

name: Ameba
description:
A monster that
envelops an enemy
and slowly digests
it.

name: Korogashi
description: This creature rolls\nmassive objects\nto crush its enemies.

name: Boo Koo
description: A book wizard with\npage after page of\npotent spells.

name: Flower Wolf
description: A beast covered in\nflowers from head to\ntoe.

name: Rainbow Flower
description:
A flower creature
with rainbow-colored
blossoms that lure
an enemy into its
waiting jaws.

name: Barrel Lily
description: A dangerous flower\nthat fires pollen\nprojectiles.

name: Needle Ball
description:
A ball covered in
sharp needles.
Usually rains down on
enemies in a group.

name: Peacock
description:
A beautiful peacock-
like creature that
fires its feathers at
opponents.

name: Hoshiningen
description:
Trailed by
a beautiful tail,
this shooting star
inflicts damage when
it hits an enemy.

name: Maha Vailo
description: A wizard dressed in\nblue who is usually\nfound meditating.

name: Rainbow Marine Mermaid
description:
An unusual mermaid
that appears
whenever a rainbow
bridges the sky.

name: Musician King
description:
A fantastic guitar
player that attacks
enemies with
ultrasonic emissions.

name: Wilmee
description: A ferocious rabbit\nwith sharp claws.

name: Yado Karu
description: A hermit crab with\nthe head of a dragon.

name: Morinphen
description: A strange fiend\nwith long arms and\nrazor-sharp talons.

name: Kattapillar
description:
Attacks by blowing
webs at its enemies.
Nobody knows what
the final form of this
insect might be.

name: Dragon Seeker
description:
A fearsome monster
sent from the
netherworld
to destroy dragons.

name: Man-eater Bug
description:
A creature that
slices and dices with
its scissors and
feeds off its victims.

name: D. Human
description:
Gifted with the power
of dragons,
this warrior wields a
sword created from a
dragon's fang.

name: Turtle Raccoon
description: A fox-like creature\nwith a protective\nshell.

name: Fungi of the Musk
description:
A monster that leaks
acid from its pores
to melt anything that
touches its skin.

name: Prisman
description:
A clear crystal that
focuses light to
create a powerful
laser beam.

name: Gale Dogra
description:
A huge moth that
generates a
whirlwind containing
poison dust.

name: Crazy Fish
description: A flying fish with\na sharp head for\npiercing targets.

name: Cyber Saurus
description: A mechanical dinosaur\nequipped with a beam\ncannon.

name: Bracchio-raidus
description:
A colossal dinosaur
that stomps on
anything that
wanders into its
path.

name: Laughing Flower
description: A laughing flower\nwhose chuckles can\ndrive an enemy mad.

name: Bean Soldier
description:
A plant warrior that
attacks with a
combination of
sword-swings and pea
projectiles.

name: Cannon Soldier
description: A highly destructive\nmachine armed with a\npowerful cannon.

name: Guardian of the Throne Room
description:
A sentry robot armed
with homing rockets
for guarding throne
rooms from intruders.

name: Brave Scizzar
description:
A creature capable
of manipulating
several scissors
with definite results.

name: The Statue of Easter Island
description:
A massive stone idol
from Easter Island
that fires laser
rings from its mouth.

name: Muka Muka
description:
A monster that
angers an opponent
to the point that
the enemy goes
berserk.

name: Sand Stone
description:
Appears from
underground and
attacks with long,
snake-like tentacles.

name: Boulder Tortoise
description: A stone turtle with\na very high defense\nfactor.

name: Fire Kraken
description: A fiery squid that\ncan maintain its\nflames underwater.

name: Turtle Bird
description: A rare flying turtle\nthat inhabits the\nsea.

name: Skullbird
description: The breath from this\nbird robs creatures\nof their life force.

name: Monstrous Bird
description: A huge bird known\nfor its sharp dive\nattacks.

name: The Bistro Butcher
description:
Defeated enemies
serve as ingredients
for this gourmet
monster.

name: Star Boy
description: An extraterrestrial\nlife form that loves\nliving in water.

name: Spirit of the Mountain
description:
Music from this
creature's flute can
drain an enemy's
willpower.

name: Neck Hunter
description:
Armed with a huge
sickle, this monster
can fire beams from
its large eyes.

name: Milus Radiant
description:
Often mistaken as a
cute pet,
this creature is a
very dangerous
beast.

name: Togex
description: A very fast monster\nthat rolls up and\nrams its enemies.

name: Flame Cerebrus
description: A flaming beast that\nis lethal to the\ntouch.

name: Eldeen
description: Uses a wand to cast\nvarious spells\nagainst an enemy.

name: Mystical Sand
description: Turns enemies to\nstone and crushes\nthem to dust.

name: Gemini Elf
description: Elf twins that attack\nan enemy from\nopposite sides.

name: Kwagar Hercules
description:
An insect monster
with the jaws of
a stag beetle and
the horn of a beetle.

name: Minar
description:
A monster with four
highly dexterous
arms for executing
separate attacks.

name: Kamakiriman
description: A man-shaped mantis\nwith two razor-sharp\nscythes.

name: Mechaleon
description:
A chameleon-like
monster that can
hide anywhere by
changing colors.

name: Mega Thunderball
description:
Rolls along the
ground releasing
bolts of electricity
to attack its
enemies.

name: Niwatori
description: Swallows enemies\nwhole and uses their\nessence as energy.

name: Corroding Shark
description:
A zombie shark that
wanders the ocean
depths, cursing any
that dare cross its
path.

name: Skelengel
description:
A phantom fairy that
fires countless
arrows at anything
that harbors an urge
to attack.

name: Hane-Hane
description:
This creature blocks
enemy movement with
gale-force winds
and attacks with
a massive battle axe.

name: Misairuzame
description: A rocket-launching\nfish protected\nby thorny spikes.

name: Tongyo
description:
This creature is
powered by the life
force of the fishes
it captures with its
long tongue.

name: Dharma Cannon
description:
A highly accurate
mechanical monster
covered with large-
caliber cannons.

name: Skelgon
description:
A skeletal zombie
dragon that is
capable of flying
across the skies.

name: Wow Warrior
description:
A massive beast of a
fish with arms, legs,
and razor-sharp
teeth.

name: Griggle
description:
This monster spins
about its enemy
launching blinding
leaves and painful
seeds.

name: Bone Mouse
description: A zombie rat that\nhunts felines.

name: Frog The Jam
description: A slime creature with\na frog's head that\ncroaks as it attacks.

name: Behegon
description:
A strange sea
serpent with a
massive mouth lined
with huge fangs.

name: Dark Elf
description: A wicked elf that\njust loves to engage\nin battle.

name: Winged Dragon #2
description: Creates powerful\ntornadoes with its\nhuge wings.

name: Mushroom Man #2
description:
A fully grown
Mushroom Man with an
increased attack
factor.

name: Lava Battleguard
description:
This brother of
Swamp Battleguard
may not be powerful,
but is pretty good
on defense.

name: Tyhone #2
description: A crimson dragon\nthat spits fireballs\nat its enemies.

name: The Wandering Doomed
description: A monster that\naimlessly wanders\nin search of enemies.

name: Steel Ogre Grotto #1
description: A steel idol\nworshipped in the\nLand of Machines.

name: Pot the Trick
description: A not very reliable\nsorcerer's servant.

name: Oscillo Hero
description: A strange warrior\nfrom another\ndimension.

name: Invader from Another Dimension
description: A creature that came\nfrom another galaxy.

name: Lesser Dragon
description:
A low-class,
minor dragon
incapable of
breathing fire.

name: Needle Worm
description: A larva with steel\nspikes to attack the\nunwary.

name: Wretched Ghost of the Attic
description: A harmless creature\nusually found in the\nattic of any home.

name: Great Mammoth of Goldfine
description:
A very unusual
skeletal zombie
elephant with glowing
gold bones.

name: Man-eating Black Shark
description:
A black shark that
can detect almost
any scent in the
water.

name: Yormungarde
description: A very long snake\nthat often appears\nin legends and myths.

name: Darkworld Thorns
description:
A thorny plant found
in the darklands that
wraps itself around
any unwary traveler.

name: Anthrosaurus
description: Man-like dinosaur\nlacking in strength,\nbut with a high I.Q.

name: Drooling Lizard
description:
A blood-sucking
snake in human form
that attacks any
living being that
passes nearby.

name: Trakadon
description:
A tiger-striped
dragon that is often
seen racing across
the wasteland with
tremendous speed.

name: B. Dragon Jungle King
description:
A jet-black dragon
that inhabits the
jungles and feeds on
trees.

name: Empress Judge
description: Empress of the\nGolden Kingdom. None\nmay refuse her will.

name: Little D
description: A very ferocious\nmonster spawned from\na T-Rex.

name: Witch of the Black Forest
description:
This forest-dwelling
witch can see all
with the eye on her
forehead.

name: Ancient One of the Deep Forest
description:
A white goat that
has inhabited the
forest for ages.
The creature is
actually an elder of
the woods.

name: Giant Scorpion of the Tundra
description:
A rare scarlet
scorpion that can be
found in the tundra
-- not in the desert.

name: Crow Goblin
description:
A very wise,
long-nosed goblin
with supernatural
powers.

name: Leo Wizard
description:
A wizard with a black
cape that is actually
a talking lion
disguised as a man.

name: Abyss Flower
description: A rare flower\nthat blooms in a\npitch-dark abyss.

name: Patrol Robo
description:
A cutting-edge robot
that eliminates
intruders upon
detection.

name: Takuhee
description: This bird is a\nprecursor to\ndisaster{15}{15}

name: Dark Witch
description:
A popular creature in
mythology that
delivers judgement
with a sharp spear.

name: Weather Report
description:
This creature is
known to predict the
weather with very
little accuracy.

name: Binding Chain
description:
This creature
corners its enemies
and seals away their
power.

name: Mechanical Snail
description:
A mechanically
enhanced snail that
is no faster than it
used to be.

name: Greenkappa
description:
A creature that
transforms into the
image of its enemy
and copies every
offensive move.

name: Mon Larvas
description:
A highly evolved
Larvas that is even
more powerful than
before.

name: Living Vase
description:
A living vase that
blinds enemies with
pollen and attacks
with its sharp teeth.

name: Tentacle Plant
description:
Attacks a nearby
opponent by reaching
out with its blue
vines.

name: Beaked Snake
description:
Wraps its coils
around opponents and
pecks them with its
huge beak.

name: Morphing Jar
description:
A large jar that
attacks nearby
enemies by unleashing
the monster it
contains inside.

name: Muse-A
description: A fairy of the arts\nand an excellent\nharp player.

name: Giant Turtle Who Feeds on Flames
description: A monster turtle\nwith a crimson shell.\nIt feeds on fire.

name: Rose Spectre of Dunn
description:
A red rose possessed
by a vile spirit that
feeds on the life
force of others to
provide the flower
with nourishment.

name: Fiend Refrection #1
description: Drags enemies into a\nmirror world.

name: Ghoul with an Appetite
description: A monster that can\neat all it wants but\nis never fulfilled.

name: Pale Beast
description:
With skin tinged a
bluish white,
this strange
creature is a
fearsome sight to
behold.

name: Little Chimera
description:
A monster created
from an experimental
attempt to graft
wings on beasts.

name: Violent Rain
description: A monster capable of\nbringing on sudden\nrain showers.

name: Key Mace #2
description: Seals away the good\nin a soul to create a\nwicked being.

name: Tenderness
description: A cute fairy\ndedicated to bringing\nabout eternal love.

name: Penguin Soldier
description: A low-class penguin\nsoldier that attacks\nin a group.

name: Fairy Dragon
description: A beautiful and\npowerful dragon\nfairy.

name: Obese Marmot of Nefariousness
description: An ill-mannered field\nmouse that chews on\nanything.

name: Liquid Beast
description: A liquid life form\nthat moves freely in\nwater.

name: Twin Long Rods #2
description: An undersea creature\nthat attacks with\ntwo whip-like tails.

name: Great Bill
description:
A monster with a
massive maw that
allows it to swallow
an enemy whole.

name: Shining Friendship
description: The peacemaker among\nmonsters.

name: Bladefly
description:
A monster fly that
swoops down with
sharp sword-like
arms extended out
front.

name: Electric Lizard
description:
A lizard that
discharges
electricity stored in
its body.

name: Hiro's Shadow Scout
description: A servant of fiends\nused primarily for\nscouting an area.

name: Lady of Faith
description: Soothes the souls of\nothers by chanting a\nmysterious spell.

name: Twin-headed Thunder Dragon
description:
A two-headed
Thunder Dragon
capable of powerful
electric attacks.

name: Hunter Spider
description: A hunter that uses\nits spider web to\nentrap its enemies.

name: Armored Starfish
description:
A bluish starfish
with a solid hide
capable of fending
off attacks.

name: Hourglass of Courage
description:
A fairy that controls
the feelings of
others,
instilling them with
bravery.

name: Marine Beast
description:
A sea creature with
sharp teeth that
won't release a
victim once they're
locked on.

name: Warrior of Tradition
description:
A lady warrior
drenched in the
essence from a
thousand
battlefields.

name: Rock Spirit
description:
A clay idol
representing a rock
spirit. The creature
has significant
attack and defense
factors.

name: Snakeyashi
description:
A creature made up
of several snakes
that attack
separately in battle.

name: Succubus Knight
description: A vile warrior wizard\nadept at casting\ndoom-dealing spells.

name: Ill Witch
description:
Controls air
currents and can
generate a sudden
gust of wind to blow
away an opponent.

name: The Thing That Hides in the Mud
description:
The appearance of
this creature is
preceded by the
ground melting under
an opponent's feet.

name: High Tide Gyojin
description:
An amphibian warrior
that can easily
navigate beneath the
waters.

name: Fairy of the Fountain
description: A fairy dedicated to\nprotecting fountains\nfrom pollution.

name: Amazon of the Seas
description: A mermaid sentry\nserving the Sea King\nand his kingdom.

name: Nekogal #2
description:
This fast creature
can easily elude
enemy attacks and
counter them with
its vicious claws.

name: Witch's Apprentice
description:
An inexperienced
witch who just
started learning the
mystic arts.

name: Armored Rat
description: A rat that is\nprotected by\narmor-like fur.

name: Ancient Lizard Warrior
description: A powerful,\nprehistoric lizard\nwarrior.

name: Maiden of the Moonlight
description:
A lunar sorcerer
that uses mystical
spells to induce
hallucinations.

name: Stone Ogre Grotto
description: A rock giant\nconsisting of massive\nboulders.

name: Winged Egg of New Life
description: A messenger of\nnewborn life.

name: Night Lizard
description: A green-scaled lizard\nwarrior dedicated to\nprotecting the sea.

name: Queen's Double
description: Not very useful\ndouble of a queen.

name: Blue-winged Crown
description:
A bird that glows
with blue flames and
has a head of hair
shaped like a crown.

name: Trent
description:
A protector of the
forest, this massive
tree continues to
grow.

name: Queen of Autumn Leaves
description:
Queen of the
Tree Spirit who is
embraced by brilliant
autumn leaves.

name: Amphibious Bugroth
description: A Bugroth unit\nmodified for\nunderwater warfare.

name: Acid Crawler
description:
A gigantic
caterpillar that
spits acid capable of
melting almost
anything.

name: Invader of the Throne
description:
A scheming queen who
covets the king's
throne during his
absence.

name: Mystical Sheep #1
description: A black-haired sheep\nthat is capable of\nsorcery.

name: Disk Magician
description:
A creature that
hides in a saucer and
appears only to
attack enemies.

name: Flame Viper
description: A very swift,\nfire-breathing viper.

name: Royal Guard
description:
Mechanical soldier
with a mind of its
own.
Originally created to
protect members of
the royal family.

name: Gruesome Goo
description: Looks like any other\nslime, but definitely\nmuch more powerful{15}

name: Hyosube
description:
This amphibian
creature boasts a
high attack factor,
but not much of one
for defense.

name: Machine Attacker
description: A machine designed to\nblitz its enemies.

name: Hibikime
description:
Confuses enemy
monsters with noise
that is harsh to the
ears.

name: Whiptail Crow
description: Attacks from the\nskies with a\nwhip-like tail.

name: Kunai with Chain
description:
A boomerang
featuring the effects
of two cards{58}
the Legendary Sword
and the Sword of
Dark Destruction.

name: Magical Labyrinth
description: A card for boosting\nthe power of the\nLabyrinth Wall.

name: Warrior Elimination
description:
Destroys all
opponent Warrior
cards played on the
field.

name: Salamandra
description:
Increases the
strength of those
who control the
power of Salamandra.

name: Cursebreaker
description:
Cancels the magic
over all
level-reduced
monsters and sets
them at level 0.

name: Eternal Rest
description: Eliminates all Zombie\ncreatures.

name: Megamorph
description:
A card that
increases the power
of any selected
monster by 2 levels.

name: Metalmorph
description: A card that changes\nany selected monster\nto a Machine monster.

name: Winged Trumpeter
description: A horn that\nincreases the power\nof Fairy creatures.

name: Stain Storm
description: Acid rain destroys\nan opponent's Machine\nmonsters.

name: Crush Card
description:
Opponent monsters
in play with attack
factors of 1{5c}00 or
more are eliminated.

name: Eradicating Aerosol
description:
An insecticide for
wiping out an
opponent's Insect
monsters that are
currently in play.

name: Breath of Light
description:
A magic wind that
reduces to rubble an
opponent's Rock
monsters that are
currently in play.

name: Eternal Draught
description:
A blast of heat dries
up and eliminates an
opponent's Fish
monsters that are
currently in play.

name: Curse of Millennium Shield
description:
Sacrifices the
monster with the
highest defense
rating and summons
Shield.

name: Yamadron Ritual
description:
Sacrifices
Beast-Warrior,
Dragon, and Pyro
monsters to summon
Yamadron.

name: Gate Guardian Ritual
description:
Sacrifices Kazejin,
Suijin, and Sanga of
the Thunder to
summon Gate Guardian.

name: Bright Castle
description: A glaring light that\nincreases the power\nof all monsters.

name: Shadow Spell
description:
Decreases an
opponent's in-play
monsters by two
levels.

name: Black Luster Ritual
description:
Ceremony conducted
to summon
Black Luster Soldier.
Sacrifice required.

name: Zera Ritual
description: Ceremony conducted\nto summon Zera.\nSacrifice required.

name: Harpie's Feather Duster
description: Destroys all\nopponent Magic cards\nthat are in play.

name: War-lion Ritual
description: Ceremony conducted\nto summon War Lion.\nSacrifice required.

name: Beastry Mirror Ritual
description:
Ceremony conducted
to summon
Fiend's Mirror.
Sacrifice required.

name: Ultimate Dragon
description: Sacrifice three\nBlue-eyes to summon\nUltimate Dragon.

name: Commencement Dance
description: Sacrifice Dancer and\nWarrior to summon\nPerformance of Sword.

name: Hamburger Recipe
description:
A card with the
ingredients for
making a delicious
hamburger.

name: Revival of Sennen Genjin
description:
Sacrifice
Beast-Warrior and
Golem to summon
Sengenjin.

name: Novox's Prayer
description:
Sacrifice Warrior and
Scythe Wielder to
summon
Skull Guardian.

name: Curse of Tri-Horned Dragon
description: Sacrifice a horned\nmonster to summon\nTri-Horned Dragon.

name: House of Adhesive Tape
description:
Monsters with Attack
Factors of {5c}00 or
lower are eliminated
from the play field.

name: Eatgaboon
description:
Monsters with Attack
Factors of 1000 or
lower are eliminated
from the play field.

name: Bear Trap
description:
When an opposing
monster's Attack
Factor is 1{5c}00 or
lower, it is
eliminated from the
play field.

name: Invisible Wire
description:
When an opposing
monster's Attack
Factor is 2000 or
lower, it is
eliminated from the
play field.

name: Acid Trap Hole
description:
When an opposing
monster's Attack
Factor is 3000 or
lower, it is
eliminated from the
play field.

name: Widespread Ruin
description:
When an opponent's
monster attacks, it
is blown to
smithereens and
eliminated from the
play field.

name: Goblin Fan
description:
Reflects the damage
of direct attack
cards like Fire
Sparks and Inferno
back to your
opponent.

name: Bad Reaction to Simochi
description:
A card that reverses
the effects of
recovery cards and
transforms the
points to damage.

name: Reverse Trap
description:
A card that reverses
the effects of
power-up cards and
transforms the
effects to power
reduction.

name: Fake Trap
description:
A trap card for
tricking your
opponent.
Nothing happens when
it is attacked.

name: Revived of Serpent Night Dragon
description:
Select a specific
monster for
sacrifice and summon
Serpent Night Dragon.

name: Turtle Oath
description: Sacrifice crab and\nturtle to summon\nCrab Turtle.

name: Contruct of Mask
description: Sacrifice a masked\none to summon a new\nmask.

name: Resurrection of Chakra
description:
Sacrifice 3 Fiend
monsters to conduct
the ritual for the
Resurrection of
Chakra.

name: Puppet Ritual
description: Sacrifice Puppeteer\nand Machine monsters\nto summon the Puppet.

name: Javelin Beetle Pact
description:
Sacrifice the stag
beetle and beetle
to summon
Javelin Beetle.

name: Garma Sword Oath
description:
Sacrifice the
Ashura's Arm
and Sword-wielder
to summon.

name: Cosmo Queen's Prayer
description: Sacrifice a normal\nQueen to summon\nCosmo Queen.

name: Revival of Skeleton Rider
description: Sacrifice Temple and\nCockroach to summon\nDokurorider.

name: Fortress Whale's Oath
description: Sacrifice Horn and\nMachine Fish to\nsummon Sea Fortress.

name: Performance of Sword
description: A warrior dancer with\nfancy dance steps.

name: Hungry Burger
description:
Attracts hungry
enemies with tasty
aromas and eats them
when they get close
enough.

name: Sengenjin
description:
A headstrong,
primitive man
equipped with
a Millennium Item.

name: Skull Guardian
description:
A guardian of the law
that doesn't forgive
cheating.
Attacks enemies with
its sword-like arms.

name: Tri-horned Dragon
description:
A wicked dragon with
three horns
protruding from its
head.

name: Serpent Night Dragon
description: A dragon created\nfrom the soul of a\nwicked knight.

name: Skull Knight
description:
A monk who has
conducted several
rituals in the
netherworld, and who
is capable of using
both weapons and
magic.

name: Cosmo Queen
description: A queen who rules\nover all the stars in\nthe universe.

name: Chakra
description: A twisting shape\nthat attacks with\ntentacle-like arms.

name: Crab Turtle
description:
A creature with a
turtle shell and
crab scissors to
provide high attack
and defense factors.

name: Mikazukinoyaiba
description:
A dragon warrior
armed with a
crescent-shaped
sword. Rumored to be
from the moon.

name: Meteor Dragon
description:
A dragon that
arrived on earth by
means of a comet
that fell from the
far reaches of space.

name: Meteor B. Dragon
description:
With the burning hide
of a meteorite,
this creature
vaporizes all that it
touches.

name: Firewing Pegasus
description:
A heavenly stallion
that flies across the
skies on scarlet
wings.

name: Psycho-Puppet
description:
A mysterious doll
with a strange dance
that robs the power
of opposing monsters.

name: Garma Sword
description:
A skilled warrior
that wields six
swords against
opposing monsters.

name: Javelin Beetle
description:
A creature with
lethal scissors that
cut through almost
anything.

name: Fortress Whale
description:
A sea monster with a
cannon mounted on
its back to blow its
enemies out of the
water.

name: Dokurorider
description:
A lonely rider that
races across the
wasteland,
raising thick clouds
of dust.

name: Mask of Shine & Dark
description:
A creature that
twists the fabric of
light and darkness
to generate images
to confuse opponents.

name: Dark Magic Ritual
description:
Ceremony for
summoning the
Magician of
Black Chaos.
Sacrifice required.

name: Magician of Black Chaos
description:
The ultimate
magic-user,
who wields the power
of chaos borne from
the fusion of
Dark and Light.
